changelog: Phase 13B.4 + 13B.5: новый docs/architecture-map.md — feature → file/API/DB/cron map по всем 14 feature-areas (KDS, inventory, loyalty, multi-location, analytics-v2, reservations, webhooks, marketing, reviews, group split-bill, waitlist, staff v2, fiscal, i18n) + cross-cutting subsystems + repo layout после Phase 13B.3 рефакторинга. docs/feature-audit-matrix.md синхронизован: Phase 7 (54-ФЗ, i18n, staff v2, advanced split-bill payments) + Phase 8 (marketing, group ordering, waitlists, reviews) переведены из 'planned' в 'Implemented' с актуальными file paths и ссылками на module-doc'и. iiko остаётся 'planned (deferred — explicit user decision Phase 13)'.
